hero.title: M1 Computer Science Student — AI & Development
hero.tagline: Curious, motivated and passionate about technology and innovative projects.

about.title: About
about.body: I am a Master's student in Computer Science at the University of Angers, specializing in artificial intelligence and software development. I am looking for a work-study position starting September 2026.

p01.title: Video Analysis — Internship
p01.description: Movement detection and tracking using computer vision to extract the rhythm of dances. Completed during an internship at the University of Angers.

p02.title: Custom Programming Language
p02.description: Design of a programming language with a complete compiler, including lexical/syntactic analysis and a standard library.

p03.title: MCTS Agent
p03.description: Development of an intelligent agent based on Monte Carlo Tree Search to play a game with unknown rules.

p04.title: Pacman AI
p04.description: Pacman remake with advanced AI: chase, flee and surround behaviors, real-time movement optimization.

p05.title: Fault Detection — AI
p05.description: Intelligent diagnostic system from a fact list, based on the AO* algorithm and rule-based reasoning.

p06.title: Personal Portfolio
p06.description: Bilingual portfolio (FR/EN) built with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Deployed on GitHub Pages.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out for any work-study opportunity.
contact.availability: Available for a work-study position starting September 2026
